record.field: 以PET（聚酯薄膜）为基材，双面涂布压敏胶水并贴合离型纸而成 具有良好的抗拉强度 采用改性丙烯酸胶粘剂，具有良好的粘着力及耐温耐候性 良好的模切效果
适用于对金属、玻璃、塑料板材、泡棉等材料的粘结和固定 适用于LCD铭板、笔记本电脑、手机等零部件的固定

field.name: value_ids
field.eval: [ Command.link(ref('attr_val_dst3')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_dst5')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_dst8h')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_dst10')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_dst15b')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_dst20')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_sdk8101p')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_sdk8102p')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_dst8103c')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_sdk8105')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_sdk81108hp')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_dstt7n')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_dstt13n')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_sat005h')), Command.link(ref('attr_val_sdk8110spr1')), ]

value.eval: [ ('DST-3', {'default_code': 'DST-3', 'variant_thickness': '35±5 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '13/13', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': '> 800 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': '胶+PET+胶+白色LXZ', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('DST-5', {'default_code': 'DST-5', 'variant_thickness': '55±5 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '20/23', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': '> 1000 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': '胶+PET+胶+白色LXZ', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('DST-8黄', {'default_code': 'DST-8黄', 'variant_thickness': '95±10 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '35/35', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': '> 1500 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': '胶+PET+胶+黄色格拉辛', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('DST-10', {'default_code': 'DST-10', 'variant_thickness': '100±10 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '35/40', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': '> 1200 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': '胶+PET+胶+白色LXZ', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('DST-15B', {'default_code': 'DST-15B', 'variant_thickness': '150±15 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '50/50', 'variant_color': '黑色', 'variant_peel_strength': '> 1500 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': '胶+黑PET+胶+白色LXZ', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('DST-20', {'default_code': 'DST-20', 'variant_thickness': '190±20 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '50/50', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': '> 1200 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': '胶+PET+胶+白色LXZ', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('SDK8101P', {'default_code': 'SDK8101P', 'variant_thickness': '12±2 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '4/4', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': '> 800 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': '50LXM+胶+PET+胶+75LXM', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('SDK8102P', {'default_code': 'SDK8102P', 'variant_thickness': '20±5 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '8/8', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': '> 1200 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': '50LXM+胶+PET+胶+75LXM', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('DST8103C', {'default_code': 'DST8103C', 'variant_thickness': '35±5 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '13/13', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': '> 800 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': '胶+PET+胶+白色LXZ', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('SDK8105', {'default_code': 'SDK8105', 'variant_thickness': '55±5 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '20/23', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': '> 1000 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': '胶+PET+胶+SDK logo LXZ', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('SDK81108HP', {'default_code': 'SDK81108HP', 'variant_thickness': '80±10 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '27/28', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': '> 800 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': '50LXM+胶+PET+胶+25LXM', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('DSTT-7N', {'default_code': 'DSTT-7N', 'variant_thickness': '70±10 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '15/45', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': 'A> 1000 B> 800 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': 'LXZ+胶+PET+胶+黄网格LXZ', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('DSTT-13N', {'default_code': 'DSTT-13N', 'variant_thickness': '130±10 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '30/50', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': 'A> 1200 B> 800 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': 'LXZ+胶+PET+胶+黄色网格LXZ', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('SAT-005黄', {'default_code': 'SAT-005黄', 'variant_thickness': '55±5 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '20/23', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': '> 1000 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': '胶+PET+胶+黄色格拉辛', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ('SDK8110SP-R1',{'default_code': 'SDK8110SP-R1','variant_thickness': '50±5 μm', 'variant_adhesive_thickness': '25/13', 'variant_color': '透明', 'variant_peel_strength': 'A> 1400 B 100±40 gf/inch', 'variant_structure': '75蓝LXM+A胶+PET+B胶+50LXM', 'variant_adhesive_type': '丙烯酸', 'variant_base_material': 'PET'}), ]
